text: - B. Failure to obtain and maintain the required insurance shall constitute a material breach of, and default under, this Subcontract. If Subcontractor shall fail to remedy such breach within five (5) business days after written notice by Contractor, Subcontractor will be liable for any and all costs, liabilities, damages and penalties resulting  to  Contractor  Parties  from  such  breach,  unless  a  written  waiver  of  the  specific  insurance requirements(s) is provided to Subcontractor by Contractor.
